nodes.name: aside.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /aside slash command that freezes the current task state, answers an interrupting question directly, then resumes the main task — providing a structured pattern for handling mid-task digressions without losing context.

nodes.name: auto-update.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /auto-update slash command that triggers automatic self-update of the ECC plugin installation.

nodes.name: build-fix.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /build-fix slash command that detects the build system, parses and groups build errors, then iteratively fixes them one at a time with guardrails and a final summary.

nodes.name: checkpoint.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /checkpoint slash command for creating, verifying, and listing named checkpoints that snapshot in-progress work state during a session.

nodes.name: code-review.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /code-review slash command with two modes — local diff review and GitHub PR review — each structured as multi-phase pipelines covering gather/fetch, context, review, validate, decide, report, publish, and output stages.

nodes.name: cost-report.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /cost-report slash command that queries Claude Code usage data to produce summary, project, tool, and time-range cost breakdowns with optional CSV export.

nodes.name: cpp-build.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /cpp-build slash command that detects the C++ build system (CMake, Makefile, Bazel), runs diagnostic checks, and iteratively fixes compilation errors through a structured build-and-repair loop.

nodes.name: cpp-review.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /cpp-review slash command that performs a structured C++ code review across CRITICAL, HIGH, and MEDIUM severity categories, running automated static-analysis checks and producing an approval decision.

nodes.name: cpp-test.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /cpp-test slash command that drives a full TDD cycle for C++ using Google Test / Catch2, including red-green-refactor loops, fixture and parameterized test patterns, and coverage reporting.

nodes.name: ecc-guide.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /ecc-guide slash command that acts as an interactive help system for the ECC harness, supporting no-argument overview mode, topic lookup, fuzzy search, and feature lookup across all installed commands and agents.

nodes.name: epic-claim.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-claim slash command that assigns an epic work item to the current agent or session.

nodes.name: epic-decompose.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-decompose slash command that breaks down a large epic into smaller, actionable tasks or stories.

nodes.name: epic-publish.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-publish slash command that publishes a completed or ready epic to the project tracking system.

nodes.name: epic-review.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-review slash command that reviews the scope, progress, and quality of an epic work item.

nodes.name: epic-sync.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-sync slash command that synchronizes epic state with external project tracking systems.

nodes.name: epic-unblock.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-unblock slash command that identifies and resolves blockers preventing progress on an epic.

nodes.name: epic-validate.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /epic-validate slash command that validates the acceptance criteria and completeness of an epic before marking it done.

nodes.name: evolve.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /evolve slash command that classifies a freeform instruction into the correct ECC artifact type (command, skill, or agent) and generates the corresponding file in the appropriate format with correct frontmatter.

nodes.name: fastapi-review.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /fastapi-review slash command that reviews FastAPI Python applications across routing, dependency injection, validation, error handling, and security categories.

nodes.name: feature-dev.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /feature-dev slash command that guides a full feature development lifecycle from discovery through codebase exploration, clarifying questions, architecture design, implementation, quality review, and summary.
